title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 199.051 - Inspections, department may conduct, when
text:
199.051.  Inspections, department may conduct, when. — The department may inspect any facility or program at any time if a contract has been issued or an application for a contract has been filed.
(L. 1991 H.B. 218 merged with S.B. 125 & 341, A.L. 2011 H.B. 464)
